assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: Response clearly identifies 2 dev clusters on Rapid channel and 2 prod clusters on Stable channel throughout both checklists, with specific references to different channels and their upgrade timing

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions Autopilot limitations including no node SSH access, Google manages nodes automatically, and mandatory resource requests with multiple references throughout

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes checking deprecated API usage via GKE deprecation insights dashboard and reviewing K8s 1.32 breaking changes with specific deprecation guide link

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Response repeatedly emphasizes mandatory resource requests as critical for Autopilot, stating pods will be rejected without them and includes specific validation commands

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes PDBs configuration, no bare pods requirement, terminationGracePeriodSeconds limits, and other workload readiness items

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Post-upgrade checklist includes specific gcloud commands to verify cluster versions: 'gcloud container clusters describe CLUSTER-NAME --region REGION --format="value(currentMasterVersion)"'

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Post-upgrade checklist includes comprehensive workload health checks with specific kubectl commands for deployments, pods, StatefulSets, and event monitoring

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states dev clusters should have already upgraded to 1.32 on Rapid channel and recommends validating dev cluster upgrades went smoothly before prod upgrade

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the GKE release schedule or the ~1 month advance notice timeframe - only references the auto-upgrade notification timing
Both checklists include comprehensive monitoring items including Cloud Monitoring, Cloud Logging, baseline metrics, error rates, latency validation, and observability checks
